_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Windrose
author: custom@example.com
description: Windrose is a pirate co-op survival adventure. Sail the seas, build your base, craft gear and fight bosses with up to 4 players. Installs via SteamCMD (Windows branch) and runs through Proton.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Windrose Dedicated Server - Install Script

clear
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m'

echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"
echo -e "${YELLOW}Windrose Dedicated Server - Install Script${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"

if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
    echo -e "Steam user is not set. Using anonymous login."
    STEAM_USER=anonymous
    STEAM_PASS=""
    STEAM_AUTH=""
else
    echo -e "Logging in as: ${STEAM_USER}"
fi

## Download and install SteamCMD
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd

chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server

## Install game using SteamCMD (force Windows branch for Proton)
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} $( [[ "${WINDOWS_INSTALL}" == "1" ]] && printf %s '+@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows' ) +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} validate +quit

## Set up Steam libraries
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so

echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"
echo -e "${GREEN}Windrose installation complete!${NC}"
echo -e "${BLUE}-------------------------------------------------${NC}"

variables.name: [SERVER] Server Name
variables.description: The display name of your server shown to players.

variables.name: [SERVER] Max Players
variables.description: Maximum number of simultaneous players. Up to 4 recommended for stable performance.

variables.name: [SERVER] Server Password
variables.description: Password required to join the server. Leave blank for no password.

variables.name: [SERVER] Invite Code
variables.description: Custom invite code players use to find and join your server. Minimum 6 characters, alphanumeric, case-sensitive. Leave blank to auto-generate on first launch.

variables.name: [SERVER] Auto Update
variables.description: Automatically check for and apply server updates on startup.

variables.name: [SYSTEM] Windows Install
variables.description: Tells the installer to download the Windows branch so it can run on Proton. Cannot be changed.

variables.name: [SYSTEM] Steam App ID
variables.description: Steam App ID used for installation and updates. Do not change.
